import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||'http://localhost:8080';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Request interceptor to attach JWT token
api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;},error=>{return Promise.reject(error);});// Response interceptor to handle token expiry / unauthenticated requests
api.interceptors.response.use(response=>response,error=>{if(error.response&&error.response.status===401){// Clear storage and redirect on unauthorized
localStorage.clear();if(window.location.pathname!=='/login'){window.location.href='/login';}}return Promise.reject(error);});export default api;
